query:
SELECT 
  ma.id AS agendamento_id,
  ma.scheduledDate,
  ma.title,
  ma.status AS status_agendamento,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  ms.id AS sessao_id,
  ms.alunoId,
  a.name AS aluno_nome,
  ms.presence
FROM mentor_appointments ma
JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
JOIN mentoring_sessions ms ON ms.consultorId = ma.consultorId 
  AND ms.sessionDate = ma.scheduledDate 
  AND ms.alunoId = ap.alunoId
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ma.consultorId = c.id
WHERE ma.scheduledDate >= '2026-03-01' AND ma.scheduledDate <= '2026-03-31'
AND ma.status = 'cancelado'
ORDER BY ma.scheduledDate;

SELECT 
  ma.id AS agendamento_id,
  ma.scheduledDate,
  ma.title,
  ma.status AS status_agendamento,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  ms.id AS sessao_id,
  ms.alunoId,
  a.name AS aluno_nome,
  ms.presence
FROM mentor_appointments ma
JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
JOIN mentoring_sessions ms ON ms.consultorId = ma.consultorId 
  AND ms.sessionDate = ma.scheduledDate 
  AND ms.alunoId = ap.alunoId
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ma.consultorId = c.id
WHERE ma.scheduledDate >= '2026-03-01' AND ma.scheduledDate <= '2026-03-31'
AND ma.status = 'cancelado'
ORDER BY ma.scheduledDate;
